channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Property Listings
channel.description: Live Zimbabwe property listings with branded hybrid cards — photo on top, price and specs on the brand strip. One item per active listing for the Mutapa Times properties autolist.

item.title: USD 220,000 — Arlington gated community sitting on 560sqm clean title deed, swimming pool,borehole (Arlington, Harare South)
item.description: USD 220,000 — Arlington, Harare South. 4 beds, 3 baths. Arlington gated community sitting on 560sqm clean title deed, swimming pool,borehole. Browse all listings at mutapatimes.com/property #Zimbabwe #Property #ZimbabweProperty #RealEstate #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Property.co.zw
